title: Perform non-standard calibrations
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform non-standard calibrations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Select the appropriate calibration procedure

pcs.text: Identify non-conforming calibration tasks and requests and analyse their significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-conforming calibration tasks and requests and analyse their significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-conforming calibration tasks and requests and analyse their significance.

pcs.text: Review the authorised procedure and establish whether it is appropriate for the test, as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the authorised procedure and establish whether it is appropriate for the test, as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the authorised procedure and establish whether it is appropriate for the test, as required.

pcs.text: Research an alternative or adapt an existing procedure to satisfy the test specification requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research an alternative or adapt an existing procedure to satisfy the test specification requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research an alternative or adapt an existing procedure to satisfy the test specification requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the calibration procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the calibration procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the calibration procedure.

pcs.text: Obtain authorisation prior to substituting equipment, changing or deviating from the specified procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain authorisation prior to substituting equipment, changing or deviating from the specified procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain authorisation prior to substituting equipment, changing or deviating from the specified procedure.

pcs.text: Document and validate any authorised changes or deviations in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and validate any authorised changes or deviations in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and validate any authorised changes or deviations in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select the appropriate calibration procedure

elements.title: Prepare items for calibration

pcs.text: Identify hazards and use the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and use the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and use the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing.

pcs.text: Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare items for calibration

elements.title: Perform calibration

pcs.text: Perform individual tests and document each step in the calibration procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform individual tests and document each step in the calibration procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform individual tests and document each step in the calibration procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement.

pcs.text: Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required (as-found or before adjustment)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required (as-found or before adjustment)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required (as-found or before adjustment).

pcs.text: Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results (as-left or after adjustment) if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results (as-left or after adjustment) if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results (as-left or after adjustment) if required.

pcs.text: Analyse resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results.

pcs.text: Seek appropriate advice when result interpretation is outside authorised scope of approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek appropriate advice when result interpretation is outside authorised scope of approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek appropriate advice when result interpretation is outside authorised scope of approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Perform calibration

elements.title: Document results

pcs.text: Document compliance/non-compliance with requirements of test and/or specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document compliance/non-compliance with requirements of test and/or specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document compliance/non-compliance with requirements of test and/or specifications.

pcs.text: Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record the results of each test/calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the results of each test/calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the results of each test/calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively.

pcs.text: Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Document results

elements.title: Finalise calibration

pcs.text: Prepare and issue a final report for the job/item detailing testing carried out, statement of compliance and all other required information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and issue a final report for the job/item detailing testing carried out, statement of compliance and all other required information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and issue a final report for the job/item detailing testing carried out, statement of compliance and all other required information.

pcs.text: Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action with supervisor.

pcs.text: Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper resistant seals as required in workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper resistant seals as required in workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper resistant seals as required in workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report all changes and deviations that may have a significant influence on the test
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report all changes and deviations that may have a significant influence on the test?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report all changes and deviations that may have a significant influence on the test.

pcs.text: Store test equipment/measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store test equipment/measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store test equipment/measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures.
